claims.claim: C069 records the test-only stale fixture repair for Search V2 semantic-service coverage and passing focused plus broader Jest evidence.
claims.citation: src/__tests__/lib/search/search-v2-service.test.ts; runtime-verification.md; evidence-register.md C069; command output from `pnpm test -- src/__tests__/lib/search/search-v2-service.test.ts --runInBand`; command output from `pnpm test -- src/__tests__/api/search/v2/route.test.ts src/__tests__/app/search/actions.test.ts src/__tests__/lib/search/search-v2-service.test.ts --runInBand`; command output from `pnpm exec prettier --check src/__tests__/lib/search/search-v2-service.test.ts`
claims.discrepancy: The stale default lastConfirmedAt fixture was older than the 21-day public availability/contactability gate, so semantic candidates were filtered before assertions and the service correctly fell back. After C069, the focused service suite passed 1 suite / 41 tests and the broader route/action/service command passed 3 suites / 73 tests. This does not prove every /api/search/listings route-handler fallback branch. C074 later closes active chromium filter skipped cases, C079 later closes active chromium semantic/dedupe owner-baseline gaps, and C080 later closes/downgrades dedupe non-Chromium/mobile plus bounded release-gate provider breadth; semantic non-Chromium/mobile runtime behavior remains a P1 ownership residual, and broad non-gate map/provider candidates remain lower-priority confidence coverage.

claims.claim: C070 records a broader filter-browser attempt where the owner project is chromium-anon, the focused lease-duration filter spec passed, and the first full filter-suite attempt stopped at the amenities modal-open blocker.
claims.citation: runtime-verification.md; evidence-register.md C070; command output from `find tests/e2e/search-filters -maxdepth 2 -type f | sort`; command output from `pnpm exec playwright test --list --project=desktop-anonymous tests/e2e/search-filters`; command output from `pnpm exec playwright test --list --project=chromium-anon tests/e2e/search-filters`; command output from `pnpm exec playwright test tests/e2e/search-filters/filter-lease-duration.anon.spec.ts --project=chromium-anon --reporter=list --workers=1`; command output from `PLAYWRIGHT_JSON_OUTPUT_NAME=/tmp/c070-search-filters.json pnpm exec playwright test tests/e2e/search-filters --project=chromium-anon --reporter=json --workers=1`; command output from `pnpm exec playwright test tests/e2e/search-filters/filter-amenities.anon.spec.ts --project=chromium-anon --reporter=line --workers=1 --no-deps -g "selecting an amenity"`
claims.discrepancy: C070 proves only focused lease-duration browser behavior: `3 passed`, runtime about `1.7m`. The first full `tests/e2e/search-filters` command started 144 chromium-anon tests and failed immediately in `filter-amenities.anon.spec.ts` when `openFilterModal()` timed out waiting for the filters dialog. The focused retry hung before useful app behavior evidence. C071 later supersedes the amenities blocker.

The affected applied-filter specs first showed `22 passed` / `12 skipped` after only the helper locator change, then passed with `34 passed` and no skips after replacing immediate `isVisible()` skip guards with web-first visibility assertions. Two list-reporter full-folder attempts then failed once each after `125 passed` / `18 skipped`: one quick-filter readiness wait in `filter-house-rules.anon.spec.ts:50`, then one chip-bar clear-all visibility assertion in `filter-reset.anon.spec.ts:218`; focused reruns passed, and the reset case was hardened test-side. After hardening, the focused reset command passed with `1 passed`, touched applied-filter/reset specs passed with `38 passed`, and the final full list-reporter command passed with `126 passed` / `18 skipped`. The remaining skips are classified as 11 stale/obsolete removed UI cases, 4 fixture/data-dependent cases, and 3 old room-type tab UI target cases. Those 18 residuals remain not executed behavior.

Broad 164-test non-gate map/provider candidates, live provider-network visual breadth, retired low-results guidance/pagination-cap exact browser flows, unrun saved-search action/component/saved-searches page, broader journey variants, location component/provider/geolocation variants, listing-card/security residual variants, and dedicated `/api/search/listings` fallback route-handler proof remain P2 confidence coverage after C066-C080.

C068 closes/reduces the pre-fix C067 location browser/test-runtime blocker after a test-only page-object wait-ordering fix: focused B1 passed with `1 passed`, and the full desktop-anonymous location spec passed with `4 passed`. Direct component/provider/geolocation variants and broader journeys remain confidence coverage.

The desktop search harness pagination spec verifies sort reset, unique appended cards, and retryable failure/rate-limit states. C062 adds focused root pagination/sort reset and map-bounds round-trip browser proof; broader cross-browser/mobile and non-gate pagination families remain optional confidence coverage.

The concrete search/list/map public payload leak is fixed and verified by real captured payload scanning, and the package scanner now has a deterministic no-arg checked-in fixture gate. Optional live-server payload capture inside the no-arg gate remains confidence coverage if release owners require runtime parity beyond fixtures.

The docs now include compact field/cache/error tables for the main contracts, the C063 V2/search-doc versus legacy fallback contract, and C069 semantic-service suite proof, but they are not generated OpenAPI schemas, do not enumerate every optional debug-only field combination, and still need dedicated `/api/search/listings` route-handler fallback coverage.

Desktop, mobile, map error/a11y, /api/map-listings 500/429 browser behavior, C065 broader chromium-anon map/list/map-tools behavior, C077 focused map skipped-case reduction, C078 focused map zero-skip stabilization, and C080 bounded release-gate WebKit/Mobile Safari SSR/client provider breadth have passing search-harness coverage. Provider terminology is now documented as MapLibre runtime with OpenFreeMap/OpenStreetMap map resources. Broad 164-test non-gate map/provider candidates and live provider-network visual breadth remain NOT VERIFIED lower-priority confidence coverage unless promoted. Dormant Stadia config and stale Mapbox comments/fixture names are separate cleanup items.

Search-card direct contact was not found; C060 source-verifies the indirect search card -> listing detail -> Contact Host CTA handoff. A full search-to-messages browser journey remains optional product/runtime confidence coverage unless release owners promote it.

Docs distinguish committed/runtime evidence from local-only dirty worktree discovery entries; reviewers should preserve or stage remaining related source files before treating the whole local branch as stable.
The manifest uses grouped test-family entries; a machine-readable per-file test index can be generated later if needed.
